by_program.name: Operations (aggregate of all DPWH PREXC programs)
by_program.note: Aggregate of all PREXC programs under Operations. Sub-programs (not enumerated): Network Development Program (incl. road widening, bypass/diversion roads, off-carriageway improvement), Asset Preservation Program, Bridge Program, Flood Management Program, Stormwater Drainage System Construction, Convergence and Special Support Program, Local Infrastructure Program. PS/MOOE/CO computed as residual from OSEC TOTAL (p.203: PS 8,754,552 / MOOE 12,759,578 / CO 527,876,384 / Total 549,390,514) minus Gen Admin. Detailed per-program × per-region breakdown requires OCR of all 200+ pages — see DEPT_PARSER_NOTES.md.

by_program.name: Operations (aggregate of ~12 PREXC programs)
by_program.note: Aggregate of all PREXC programs under Operations. Sub-programs (not enumerated in this POC) include: Basic Education Inputs Program, Education Policy Development Program, Education Human Resource Development Program, Inclusive Education Program, GASTPE, Education Programs for the Disadvantaged, Last Mile Schools Program, Alternative Learning System, Teacher Quality and Development Program. PS/MOOE/CO are computed as residuals from OffSec total minus Gen Admin minus Support to Ops (reconciliation: 374,437,011 + 81,866,703 + 43,968,399 = 500,272,113 = ₱500.27B OffSec total). Detailed per-program breakdown requires deeper OCR pass — see DEPT_PARSER_NOTES.md.

aa_breakdown.source: FY2019 GAA Vol I-B Annex (Official Gazette April 29, 2019, p. 1074) — Automatic Appropriations purpose-by-purpose table

coverage_note:
FY2019 by_department / by_function reconstructed from OCR of the FY2019 GAA Vol I-B 'Summary of New Appropriations' (etl/ocr/run_fy2019_summary.py) plus the Vol I-B Annex Automatic Appropriations table. headlines / by_economic / total_thousands from earlier patch (etl/patch_fy2019_aa.py) sourced from BESF Table B.1 (PROPOSED-level expense classes) and the Annex (enacted AA totals). by_department sums to ~₱3,973 B — slightly higher than the BESF-anchored total_thousands of ₱3,660 B because the SummaryFY OCR captures Congressional adjustments not in BESF PROPOSED. Headlines and donut charts use the BESF values so AA-side amounts (debt-service interest, IRA) match the Annex exactly; per-department drill-downs use the enacted-level OCR values. Sub-program detail inside individual departments still requires re-OCR of per-department PDFs (tracked in etl/ocr/WORKSTREAM.md). Per-department agency-level breakdowns extracted from the SummaryFY OCR (etl/patch_fy2019_agencies.py); each by_department entry now carries a by_agency array. Sub-program / line-item detail inside each agency still requires OCR of per-department PDFs (queued).
DepEd program-level breakdown added 2026-05-10. Source: GAA FY2019 Vol I-B per-department PDF (DEPED.pdf, 137 pages, scanned). Method: targeted OCR of agency-level by-Program summary tables (pp. 5, 122, 125, 128, 130, 133, 136) via easyocr + dbm_dept_pages_parser, with manual transcription of program totals from the same source. Agency totals reconcile to existing dashboard values; program totals reconcile to agency totals within rounding.
5-dept program-level breakdown (DPWH/DILG/DND/DSWD/DOH) added 2026-05-11. Source: GAA FY2019 Vol I-B per-department PDFs in etl/_fy2019_dept_ocr/. Method: targeted OCR of GENERAL SUMMARY pages + agency-level by-Program summary pages + visual transcription via PDF render-and-read pass. All agency totals reconcile to summary by_department within rounding; all program totals reconcile to agency totals within ~5% (residual estimates flagged confidence='low' in note). See etl/ocr/DEPT_PARSER_NOTES.md for per-dept layout description.
